tasks.title: Blood Pressure Monitoring
tasks.description: Measure blood pressure twice daily and record the values.
tasks.instructions: Use the provided cuff and enter your readings into the app morning and evening.

tasks.title: Medication Review
tasks.description: Review your prescribed medicines and confirm dosage adherence.
tasks.instructions: Record each dose taken and notify the doctor if any side effects appear.

tasks.title: CBC Lab Test
tasks.description: Complete blood count to evaluate hemoglobin, white cells, and platelets.
tasks.instructions: Schedule the test in the morning and upload the report once ready.

tasks.title: Chest X-ray
tasks.description: Obtain a chest X-ray to review lung and heart status.
tasks.instructions: Visit a licensed imaging center and attach the report to the app.

tasks.title: Physiotherapy Session
tasks.description: Follow daily physiotherapy exercises for rehabilitation.
tasks.instructions: Complete the prescribed routine and log your comfort level after each session.
